source_name: BIS - Press releases
title: Global economic pressure points call for policy discipline: BIS
clean_title: Global economic pressure points call for policy discipline: BIS
summary: The sustainability of the AI boom, financial vulnerabilities and strained public finances are among pressure points facing the global economy, along with the return of inflation. The interplay of record-high public debt with the increasing role of highly-leveraged hedge funds creates a new sovereign-financial stability nexus and poses growing financial stability risks. Safeguarding price stability, ensuring fiscal sustainability, strengthening financial stability beyond the banking perimeter and structural reforms must be policy priorities.
why_selected: Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (bis - press releases) ; impact marché.
impacts: Peut affecter les conditions de marché, les valorisations ou l’allocation d’actifs.
title_signature: bis call discipline economic global points policy pressure
normalized_title: global economic pressure points call for policy discipline bis
